ddls:
CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "collection_description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., librarian, researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manuscript_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manuscript type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the manuscript type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the manuscript type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manuscript_categories" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manuscript category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the manuscript category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the manuscript category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manuscript_formats" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manuscript format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the manuscript format */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Description of the manuscript format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manuscript_languages" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manuscript language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the manuscript language */,
  "language_description" TEXT /* Description of the manuscript language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manuscript_materials" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manuscript material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the manuscript material */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Description of the manuscript material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_status" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restoration_status" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restoration status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the restoration status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the restoration status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manuscript_conservation" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation record */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the manuscripts table */,
  "conservation_status_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the conservation_status table */,
  "conservation_date" TEXT /* Date of the conservation */,
  "conservation_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the conservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manuscript_conservation_conservation_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("conservation_status_id") REFERENCES conservation_status ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manuscript_restoration" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restoration record */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the manuscripts table */,
  "restoration_status_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the restoration_status table */,
  "restoration_date" TEXT /* Date of the restoration */,
  "restoration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the restoration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manuscript_restoration_restoration_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("restoration_status_id") REFERENCES restoration_status ("id")
)
